title: God Unveils Blueprint for a Perfect World, Promises to Eradicate Poverty, Inequality, and Wars. - FinancialEDGE
description: In a groundbreaking move, God has unveiled a comprehensive plan to transform the world, free from poverty, inequality, and wars. html:
In a groundbreaking move, God has unveiled a comprehensive plan to transform the world, free from poverty, inequality, and wars.

The blueprint, revealed through Adebola Adekiitan, promises a new world order where every individual has access to equal opportunities, resources, and happiness.

The highly anticipated book, “Natural World Restoration, God Has Spoken”, was officially unveiled to the media in Lagos, marking a significant milestone in the journey towards a better world.

The book, which contains a divine blueprint for restoring the natural world, is set to inspire hope and transformation globally.

According to the author “the seven year journey with God 2024 – 2030 is to assure the world of God’s commitment to a better life for humanity. The directives of God clearly indicate that He is aware of the destruction planned by some powerful nations and individuals to confuse and enslave the citizens of the world”.
